speaker: MATT
raw_text: Hiding off in this tree beneath you is Noja, invisibility spell and vanishes behind. Beneath the ground here, off to the side is your good golem friend hidden in the dirt. Quiet sets in, gentle distant wind as the midday sun begins to stroll through. It's quiet and quieter still. You can hear the gentle bristling of high grasses against themselves. The tension causes the muscles in the back of your shoulders and neck to knot up. Watching the sun slowly crawl to its zenith. (wingbeat noises) You look up, those of you who are able, and you see a dark shape, a shadow dart off from the top of Gatshadow. Circles around, past you towards the city. Comes back. Growing larger and larger as it does. As it comes within the vicinity, it drifts up with one large beat of its wings. And (impact sound) lands into the center of this vicinity. As it hits the ground, there is a tink! (creaking sound, impact) As giant claws made of wood, metal, and rotten, angry hooks slam up out of the dirt, sending a giant cluster of dust just filling the vicinity. It woosh-- wraps around, you hear the smashing of metal and wood and low, guttural roaring. Dust has filled the area, and, for a brief moment, you have no visual on what's happened. As soon as that hits, everyone around you in the tunnels bursts through the floor, smashing through as the tunnels begin to collapse inward. Also, I need everybody to go ahead and roll intiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What does your cloak do? That I put on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage on attacking you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like, melee?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Until you get hit, and then it's gone for the round but resets for the next round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Only melee, not spells, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, at this point in time, Kevdak approaches.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Zanror.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I did it again. Zanror and two of his goliaths stay there waiting, with the offering placed at its designated spot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shit. I can't believe we're doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Any last-minute preparations?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to-- wait, Grog, where are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm down in the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is that where I am?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, wherever you want to be.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to be in the trenches.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the trenches? All right, so you make your way into the trenches, pushing past all the rest of the Herd members.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hide the hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. We'll say for the purposes of this spread so everyone knows where they're all hidden currently--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everyone knows they need to not move at all and be completely--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm down over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Pike, you're in the middle of it? Oh, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to hide. I'm not going to be a hero.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll throw her out of there if something goes wrong.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She doesn't clank if she doesn't move.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They'll see me shining with my shiny armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're right. We need to be stealthy up in the trees.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I come over the earpiece in the calm of battle and I say: if things go terribly wrong, rush to this cluster of trees. I have ways that can get us out. I feel like I should say something inspiring, but I don't have anything, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How about fuck shit up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck shit up, as Grog once said. About two days ago.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ability check or saving throw-- technically, you get plus two to ability checks, correct? I'd say, sure, you can reroll initiative if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Did he move the treasure?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on meteorite die, don't dick me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Green, lucky jade. That's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt Colville, this is on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not you, Liam, it's me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not good. Liam, yours doesn't matter. Mine does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is yours not good?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's okay, we got this. Pike's going to win the fight for us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, can I use Luck for initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What does it say for the ability?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't matter, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll find out here. It counts as an ability check. I don't see why it wouldn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's up to you. You're the boss. I love you. You're the all-seeing eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The feast gives us advantage on all initiative checks, right?
